violations.text: Foods packaged in the food establishment and available for grab and go sale was lacking all required information on food label. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The floors and walls in the hallway area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Various foods in the 2-door reach-in were observed held at 46-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Pasta salad packaged in the food establishment and available for grab and go sale was lacking all required information on food label. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

2 door reach-in was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service. All food was removed from refrigerator. Unit was unplugged during time of inspection. Equipment to be repaired/ adjusted/ replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

PIC was observed washing their hands at the 3-bay sink. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Various foods in the 2-door reach-in were observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. Foods that were recently prepped and/ or placed into this unit were placed into other refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Coleslaw, potato salad and brownies packaged in the food establishment and available for grab and go sale were lacking labels during time of inspection. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
2 door reach-in was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service to hold TCS foods. Equipment to be repaired/ adjusted/ replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The vent above the prep unit has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
